basics.name: Rohit Anand
basics.label: Data Analyst at S&P Global | MBA Business Analytics
basics.summary: MBA Business Analytics professional transforming complex datasets into actionable financial intelligence. Expert in SQL, Power BI, and Advanced Excel with a track record of driving efficiency across Finance, AdTech, and HR sectors.

bullets: Extracting investor transaction datasets via SQL and Excel, validating and reconciling records against external sources.
Evaluated 750+ prompt-response pairs generated by frontier LLMs against 8-dimension quality rubrics.
Built a standardized HR metric dictionary with 20+ global stakeholders.
Built an AI agent to automate routine People Analytics queries.
Reduced manual reporting effort by 35% by automating performance reporting across 5 dedicated dashboards.
Developed ARIMA + LSTM forecasting models with ~95% accuracy.
Optimized 50+ routes using Dijkstra's algorithm for 12.7% cost reduction.

projects.title: Airline Review Analysis
projects.desc: Sentiment analysis and service quality dashboard using Python and Power BI.

projects.title: Credit Card Default Prediction
projects.desc: Machine Learning model to identify high-risk customers with 88% precision.

projects.title: Financial Performance Dashboard
projects.desc: Automated SQL-to-Excel pipeline for real-time portfolio tracking.
